title: Local data directory
lockedHint: The data directory is pinned by a boot flag or env var — the UI can't change it. Remove --data-dir or MIMO2CODEX_DATA_DIR and restart to manage it from here.
editableHint: You can migrate the data to a new directory. The whole SQLite database, .env and providers.json are copied; restart the service after migration to load from the new location.
pointerHint: After migration the new directory is persisted at {{path}}. On boot the resolver checks CLI > env > pointer file > default.

running.title: Migration in progress…
running.warning: While migrating, all LLM requests are refused with 503. Do not close this page or kill the process.

done.title: Migration complete
done.body: Data copied to {{dir}}. Restart mimo2codex manually to load the new directory. The original directory is preserved — delete it yourself after you've confirmed the new location works.

banner.title: Server restart required
banner.body: Data directory was migrated to {{dir}}. Restart mimo2codex manually (kill + relaunch) so the new directory takes effect.
